name: Faultline Seven
specialty: A versatile team, known for their ability to navigate the unpredictable rifts of the Undercity, exploiting them for personal gain, setting them apart as the go-to crew for dangerous, high-stakes missions.

members.name: Seraphina Ironhide
members.note: A battle-hardened dwarf with a metal jaw replaced after a close encounter with a rift beast.

members.name: Thalia Skyrender
members.note: A tall, slender elf with uncanny senses honed by years of navigating the treacherous Undercity.

members.name: Razak Ironfoot
members.note: A massive half-orc with a scar running down his left cheek, a mark earned from a failed mission that left him the only survivor.

visual: Clad in leather armor, the trio moves through the Undercity with an air of authority, each member sporting a unique insignia - a seven-pointed star emblazoned on their left shoulder. They carry an assortment of weapons, from swords to crossbows, a testament to their adaptability.
reputation_note: The Undercity whispers about Faultline Seven, a crew to be wary of, but also one that can deliver on promises, provided the price is right.
